User Story: As a student, I want to login using my university ID so I can access my account.
As a student, I want to register my device so the system can identify me.
As a system, I want to detect if a student is within 10 meters of the classroom using geo-fencing.
As a system, I want to automatically mark attendance when the student enters the classroom area.
As a student, I want to receive a notification when my attendance is successfully recorded.
As a teacher, I want to view a real-time list of students present in the class.
As a teacher, I want to see attendance history for previous lectures.
As an admin, I want to manually override attendance in case of technical issues.
As a system, I want to store attendance records securely in the database.
As a teacher, I want to generate a daily attendance report for the class.
